commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The PR needs human handling because real behavior proof is mock-only, and the security-sensitive SSRF policy repair should be reviewed before merge.; Needs attention: The diff broadens QQBot API SSRF trust for a public API hostname compared with current main's narrower fake-IP exception.; Review finding: [P1] Keep QQBot API guard on the fake-IP policy — extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/api-client.ts:65 (sha=01cce32f15f64cbdbae985febc777885b4642d40)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds QQBot setup and network guidance helpers, uses them from missing-config, token, and API error paths, adds focused tests, and changes QQBot API requests to use the SSRF-guarded fetch path.

PR surface: Source +52, Tests +62. Total +114 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction. Current main still has the raw token error, terse missing-config errors, and terse API network error that the linked issue asks to improve.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs human handling because real behavior proof is mock-only, and the security-sensitive SSRF policy repair should be reviewed before merge.

target.title: feat(qqbot): add actionable setup error guidance
target.body:
## Summary

- Centralize QQBot setup/auth/network guidance in a plugin-owned helper.
- Replace terse QQBot missing-config, token, and API network errors with actionable messages that include credentials guidance and docs links.
- Preserve token retry visibility for token-fetch network failures and route QQBot API requests through the SSRF-guarded fetch path.

Closes #65868.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/setup-guidance.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `! rg 'await fetch\(' extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/api-client.ts`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: QQBot setup, token, and network failures now provide actionable credential guidance, QQ Open Platform and docs links, account-aware named-account config paths, and retry-safe token-network wording instead of terse/raw messages.

Real environment tested: Local full OpenClaw checkout on PR branch `codex/qqbot-actionable-errors-65868-20260618`, exercising the QQBot token manager and setup-guidance helper through the repository extension-messaging Vitest harness after the patch.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/setup-guidance.test.ts --reporter=verbose
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
! rg 'await fetch\(' extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/api-client.ts
```

Evidence after fix: Terminal capture from the focused QQBot run showed the changed guidance and retry behavior:

```text
✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.test.ts > QQBot token manager > adds actionable guidance when the token response has no access token
✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.test.ts > QQBot token manager > keeps token network failures visible to the retry heuristic
✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.test.ts > QQBot token manager > passes the RFC2544 SSRF allowance to the token fetch (regression for #88984)
✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/setup-guidance.test.ts > QQBot setup guidance > points default-account setup errors to env vars and docs
✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/setup-guidance.test.ts > QQBot setup guidance > points named-account setup errors to account config keys
✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/setup-guidance.test.ts > QQBot setup guidance > keeps token and network failures actionable without dropping details

Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  10 passed (10)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 4.29s
```

Observed result after fix: The QQBot tests verify default-account guidance mentions env vars and docs, named-account guidance mentions account config keys, token/network guidance stays actionable without dropping raw details, token network failures still satisfy the existing retry heuristic, and token fetch keeps the SSRF allowance path. `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` produced no output, and `rg` confirmed `extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/api-client.ts` no longer contains direct `await fetch(...)` calls.

What was not tested: A live QQ Open Platform credential flow was not run in this environment; the focused QQBot runtime-unit paths above exercise the changed setup, token, network guidance, retry-signal, and SSRF-guard behavior without external credentials.
target.author: leno23

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
